WHO.TITLE: Who We Are
WHO.DESC1: AL HENDAL Group is a diversified investment and multi-activity company dedicated to building long-term value across multiple industries. Established in the Arab Republic of Egypt, the company began as a specialized import and general trading firm and has since grown into a dynamic business group with operations spanning construction materials, hospitality, food & beverage, retail services, and lifestyle brands. Over the years, AL HENDAL has successfully developed and managed several brands serving different sectors of the market. Our portfolio includes high-quality construction and waterproofing products, premium tea and beverage brands, modern bubble tea cafés, and professional automotive care and detailing centers. Each brand reflects our commitment to innovation, quality, and delivering exceptional customer experiences. The group proudly operates through a growing network of branches and business partnerships both inside and outside Egypt, strengthening our regional presence and expanding our reach into international markets. Through strategic collaborations and franchise partnerships, we continue to connect global expertise with local market needs while maintaining international standards across all our operations.At AL HENDAL, we believe in continuous growth, operational excellence, and creating brands that combine functionality, innovation, and modern lifestyle experiences. Our vision is to become a leading regional business group recognized for quality, trust, and diversified success across multiple industries.
WHO.DESC2: تُعد مجموعة الهندال شركة استثمارية متعددة الأنشطة تهدف إلى بناء قيمة طويلة الأمد من خلال العمل في العديد من القطاعات المختلفة. تأسست الشركة في جمهورية مصر العربية كشركة متخصصة في الاستيراد والتجارة العامة، ثم تطورت لتصبح مجموعة أعمال متكاملة تعمل في مجالات مواد البناء، والعوازل، والضيافة، والمشروبات، وخدمات السيارات، والتجزئة الحديثة. على مدار السنوات، نجحت مجموعة الهندال في إنشاء وإدارة عدة علامات تجارية تخدم قطاعات متنوعة من السوق، حيث تضم المجموعة علامات متخصصة في منتجات البناء والعزل عالية الجودة، بالإضافة إلى علامات متخصصة في الشاي والمشروبات المميزة، ومقاهي البابل تي العصرية، إلى جانب مراكز متطورة لغسيل وتفصيل السيارات. وتعكس جميع هذه العلامات التزامنا المستمر بالجودة والابتكار وتقديم تجربة استثنائية للعملاء. تمتلك المجموعة شبكة متنامية من الفروع والشراكات التجارية داخل مصر وخارجها، مما يعزز من تواجدها الإقليمي ويدعم خططها للتوسع في الأسواق الدولية. كما تعتمد المجموعة على شراكات استراتيجية وخبرات عالمية لتقديم منتجات وخدمات تتوافق مع احتياجات السوق المحلي مع الحفاظ على أعلى معايير الجودة العالمية. في مجموعة الهندال، نؤمن بأن النجاح الحقيقي يقوم على التنوع، والتطوير المستمر، وبناء علامات تجارية تجمع بين الجودة والابتكار والتجربة العصرية. وتسعى المجموعة إلى أن تكون واحدة من أبرز الكيانات الاستثمارية الرائدة في المنطقة من خلال تقديم حلول ومنتجات وخدمات موثوقة في مختلف القطاعات.

FOOTPRINT.TITLE: Global Footprint
FOOTPRINT.DESC: Our strategic investments span across continents, driving innovation and sustainable growth in diverse markets. Through a growing network of partners, brands, and operational hubs, we connect global expertise with local opportunities to create measurable economic impact and long-term value for the communities we serve.

ABOUT.TITLE: Our Heritage
ABOUT.DESC_AR: تراثنا ورؤيتنا - نسعى دوماً للتميز والريادة في كافة قطاعاتنا.
ABOUT.DESC_EN: Since our inception, Al Hendal Holding Group has been built on a clear belief: long-term value is created through trust, disciplined execution, and bold innovation. What started as a focused import and general trading business has evolved into a diversified group operating across construction materials, hospitality, food and beverage, automotive care, and digital solutions. Over the years, we have expanded with a deliberate strategy, selecting sectors where operational excellence and brand quality can produce sustainable impact. Our approach combines global standards with deep local market understanding, allowing us to build resilient brands, strong partnerships, and reliable service experiences. Today, Al Hendal continues to invest in scalable ventures, people development, and modern systems that support performance, transparency, and growth. We are not only building businesses; we are building a long-term legacy that serves communities, strengthens regional markets, and creates meaningful opportunities for future generations.
ABOUT.VISION_DESC_EN: Our vision is to become a leading regional group recognized for responsible growth, operational excellence, and future-ready innovation. We aim to shape benchmarks in every sector we enter by integrating quality, efficiency, and customer-centric thinking into every stage of the value chain. Through strategic expansion, advanced technologies, and high-performance teams, we seek to transform opportunities into durable value. We envision an ecosystem of brands that are trusted by customers, respected by partners, and admired for consistency, integrity, and positive market contribution.
ABOUT.VISION_DESC_AR: رؤيتنا أن نكون الرواد المبتكرين في قطاعاتنا، ملتزمين بتقديم الحلول المتطورة والنمو المستدام في كل ما نقوم به.
ABOUT.MISSION_DESC_EN: Our mission is to deliver measurable and sustainable value to all stakeholders through disciplined execution, ethical governance, and continuous improvement. We commit to building products and services that meet international standards while remaining relevant to local market needs. We invest in talent, systems, and partnerships that strengthen performance and long-term competitiveness. In every operation, we prioritize accountability, customer trust, and responsible business practices, ensuring that growth is not only profitable but also meaningful for society and aligned with long-term environmental and community priorities.
ABOUT.MISSION_DESC_AR: مهمتنا تقديم قيمة استثنائية لشركائنا من خلال عمليات متميزة والالتزام بالمسؤولية المجتمعية والبيئية في كل سوق نخدمه.
ABOUT.INTEGRITY_DESC: Upholding the highest ethical standards in all our actions.
ABOUT.EXCELLENCE_DESC: Striving for superior quality and performance in everything we do.
ABOUT.INNOVATION_DESC: Embracing change and fostering creativity to drive future growth.
ABOUT.QUOTE: Our company was established in Egypt as a specialized import and general trading firm. From day one, our goal has been to connect world-class products and expertise with local market needs through long-lasting partnerships built on trust. Over time, this vision has grown into a diversified group with multiple brands and sectors, yet our core principle remains the same: create real value through quality, innovation, and disciplined execution. Every expansion we pursue is guided by a long-term perspective, where success is measured not only by scale, but by the impact we create for customers, partners, and the communities we serve.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Our Portfolio
PROJECTS.DESC: Explore our diversified subsidiaries and brands, each built to deliver quality, innovation, and measurable value across construction materials, hospitality, tea experiences, automotive services, and digital solutions.

SUSTAIN.TITLE: Sustainability
SUSTAIN.QUOTE: At Al Hendal Group, we believe that true success is measured by the long-term value we create for our partners, our employees, and the Egyptian market. Our commitment to sustainability is the foundation of our global vision.
SUSTAIN.ECONOMIC_DESC: Building an integrated business model that connects global suppliers with the local market. We focus on stabilizing supply chains to ensure constant economic expansion and market resilience.
SUSTAIN.COMMUNITY_DESC: Acting as a reliable bridge of trust. By providing premium products like T4 Tea and Bubble Hope, we enhance the lifestyle of our community while ensuring health and safety standards.
SUSTAIN.LEGACY_DESC: Every investment we make today is a step toward a timeless legacy. We prioritize sustainable sourcing and environmentally conscious operations to protect the world for future generations.
SUSTAIN.SOURCING_DESC: We are committed to working as a team, and we encourage creativity and innovation to provide our clients with the best quality and integrated services that meet all market needs.
SUSTAIN.GROWTH_DESC: Our vision for the future is based on continuous expansion and adding more specializations and strong teams, so that we always remain at the forefront and achieve our ambitious goals.
SUSTAIN.EMPOWERMENT_DESC: Providing sustainable job opportunities and training for the Egyptian youth in the F&B and interior design sectors through Dal and our franchise networks.
SUSTAIN.CLOSING_QUOTE: Our step towards expansion: We started our activity with our headquarters, then we recently opened a second office, and we are currently planning to open two new offices as part of our expansion plan and to support our growing business.

BRAND_DETAILS.TAGLINE: A Legacy of Excellence and Visionary Craftsmanship

alamana.NAME: Al-Amana Building Materials
alamana.DESC: We present a comprehensive range of construction products designed to meet the highest standards of quality and performance. Our solutions combine innovation, durability, and ease of application to deliver reliable, long-lasting results for residential and industrial projects.
alamana.MISSION: Providing easy and economical solutions to repair weather-related construction damage, ensuring long-term structural integrity.
alamana.VISION: To be the leading global partner in developing innovative building materials that balance high quality with cost-effectiveness.

BUBBLE_HOPE.NAME: Bubble Hope
BUBBLE_HOPE.DESC: Redefining the beverage experience with a fusion of premium ingredients and innovative flavors. Bubble Hope represents the pinnacle of modern refreshment, crafted for those who seek extraordinary taste and vibrant energy.

FORTO.NAME: FORTO
FORTO.DESC: Forto represents the gold standard in automotive maintenance, offering premium energy and care solutions for the modern driver who demands excellence.

T4_TEA.NAME: T4 TEA
T4_TEA.DESC: A sanctuary for tea connoisseurs. T4 TEA brings centuries of heritage into a contemporary setting, selecting only the finest hand-picked leaves to ensure a profound sensory journey in every cup.

SAIDY.NAME: Said Tea
SAIDY.DESC: An ode to the rich heritage of Upper Egypt. Saidy Tea offers a robust, authentic flavor profile that resonates with history and hospitality, bringing the warmth of Egyptian tradition to the global stage.

DALL.NAME: DALL Software Solutions
DALL.DESC: A leading provider of integrated digital solutions, specializing in building smart software systems and web applications that blend premium design with robust performance.

FOUNDER.TITLE: Message From The Founder
FOUNDER.QUOTE: We believe in building brands that combine innovation, quality, and long-term value.

CAREERS.TITLE: Join Our Team
CAREERS.DESC: We are always looking for passionate talents to grow with our brands and ventures.
